name: Library Maintenance Pipeline
description: Template for library repos using iron docs automation.

root.label: Plan change scope
root.details: Identify touched modules and expected API changes.

children.label: Edit source modules
children.details: Implement and keep doc comments updated.

children.label: Run tests
children.details: Execute smoke/unit tests for touched areas.

children.label: Generate library docs
children.details: Run iron docs and review markdown + bridge JSON.
